name: Autobots
changelog: Live bot now opens REAL swap-based DeepBook margin positions (mainnet-validated): LONG = borrow USDC -> buy SUI, SHORT = borrow SUI -> sell SUI; close swaps back and repays the FULL debt so strategy flips (LONG<->SHORT) work. Hardened with the DeepBook 1-SUI lot minimum, a collateral-aware leverage cap, and net-of-fees PnL. Also fixed sub-$1 TP/SL rounding that closed positions instantly.
